sub_modules.qgemm_quantize_matrix: Combinational FP32-to-unsigned-quantized conversion using Q15 scale and zero-point, with output clamping.
sub_modules.qgemm_int_matmul: Combinational integer matrix multiplication over quantized A and B after zero-point subtraction, producing INT32 accumulators.
sub_modules.qgemm_dequantize_matrix: Combinational dequantization from INT32 accumulators to FP32 using the product of Q15 scales.
